subcodes.first_line: The first remembrance that dawned from the horizon of the Mother Book, and the first light that shone forth from the horizon of the Countenance in its return, be upon thee, O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول ذکر اشرق من افق ام الکتاب و اول نور لاح من افق الوجه فی الماب علیک یا
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for forgiveness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
